ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* CBSA code for the site's location */,
  "cbsa_name" TEXT /* CBSA name for the site's location */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* State code for the site's location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State name for the site's location */,
  "county_code" INTEGER /* County code for the site's location */,
  "county" TEXT /* County name for the site's location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the site */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the site information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the data source information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_code" INTEGER /* Code for the parameter */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "measurement_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the parameter is measured */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the parameter */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the parameter information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "poc" INTEGER /* Point of contact for the site */,
  "daily_mean_pm25_concentration" REAL /* Daily mean PM2.5 concentration */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units for the data point */,
  "daily_aqi_value" INTEGER /* Daily AQI value */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter for the data point */,
  "daily_observation_count" INTEGER /* Daily observation count */,
  "percent_complete" REAL /* Percent complete for the site */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the data */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data point */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the data point was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_site_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the site */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time when the site was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_site_access_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_site_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_point_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the data point */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the data point */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_point_versions_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_parameters" (
  "site_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site parameter */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the site parameter information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_parameters_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_parameters_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_parameters" (
  "data_source_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source parameter */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the data source parameter information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_parameters_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_parameters_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_units" (
  "parameter_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter unit */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit for the parameter */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the parameter unit information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_units_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)
